actions.name: update
actions.script:
IF self.level > 0 THEN
  SET self.fluid_present = true
ELSE
  SET self.fluid_present = false
END
IF self.level <= self.low_threshold THEN
  SET self.level_low = true
ELSE
  SET self.level_low = false
END
IF self.level >= self.high_threshold THEN
  SET self.level_high = true
ELSE
  SET self.level_high = false
END

actions.name: tick
actions.script:
IF self.receiving THEN
  SET self.level = MIN(self.level + 25, 100)
  CALL self.update
END

listeners.script:
SET self.receiving = true
SET self.temperature = SUMSUP.temperature
SET self.fluid_type = SUP(0).fluid_type

components.name: Pump

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.running THEN
  SET self.running = false
  SET self.fluid_present = false
  SET self.fluid_flowing = false
  SET self.flow_rate = 0
  SET self.temperature = 20
  SET self.fluid_type = ""
ELSE
  IF ANYSUP.fluid_present THEN
    SET self.running = true
    SET self.fluid_present = true
    SET self.fluid_flowing = true
    SET self.flow_rate = 100
    SET self.temperature = SUMSUP.temperature
    SET self.fluid_type = SUP(0).fluid_type
    SET self.fault = false
  ELSE
    SET self.fault = true
  END
END

listeners.script:
IF self.running THEN
  SET self.fault = true
  SET self.running = false
  SET self.fluid_present = false
  SET self.fluid_flowing = false
  SET self.flow_rate = 0
  SET self.temperature = 20
  SET self.fluid_type = ""
END

SET self.fluid_present = true
SET self.fluid_flowing = true
SET self.flow_rate = 100
SET self.temperature = SUMSUP.temperature
SET self.fluid_type = SUP(0).fluid_type

SET self.fluid_present = false
SET self.fluid_flowing = false
SET self.flow_rate = 0
SET self.temperature = 20
SET self.fluid_type = ""

SET self.fault = true
SET self.running = false
SET self.fluid_flowing = false
SET self.flow_rate = 0
SET self.temperature = 20
SET self.fluid_type = ""

components.name: Valve

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.open THEN
  SET self.open = false
ELSE
  SET self.open = true
END
CALL self.update_flow

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF self.open THEN
  IF ANYSUP.fluid_present THEN
    SET self.fluid_present = true
  ELSE
    SET self.fluid_present = false
  END
  IF ANYSUP.fluid_flowing THEN
    SET self.fluid_flowing = true
    SET self.flow_rate = SUMSUP.flow_rate
    SET self.temperature = SUMSUP.temperature
    SET self.fluid_type = SUP(0).fluid_type
  ELSE
    SET self.fluid_flowing = false
    SET self.flow_rate = 0
    SET self.temperature = 20
    SET self.fluid_type = ""
  END
ELSE
  SET self.fluid_present = false
  SET self.fluid_flowing = false
  SET self.flow_rate = 0
  SET self.temperature = 20
  SET self.fluid_type = ""
END

listeners.script:
SET self.fluid_flowing = false
SET self.flow_rate = 0
SET self.temperature = 20
SET self.fluid_type = ""

SET self.fluid_present = false
SET self.fluid_flowing = false
SET self.flow_rate = 0
SET self.temperature = 20
SET self.fluid_type = ""

components.name: Control Valve

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.open THEN
  SET self.open = false
ELSE
  SET self.open = true
END
CALL self.update_flow

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF self.open AND self.opening > 0 THEN
  IF ANYSUP.fluid_present THEN
    SET self.fluid_present = true
  ELSE
    SET self.fluid_present = false
  END
  IF ANYSUP.fluid_flowing THEN
    SET self.fluid_flowing = true
    SET self.flow_rate = SUMSUP.flow_rate * self.opening / 100
    SET self.temperature = SUMSUP.temperature
    SET self.fluid_type = SUP(0).fluid_type
  ELSE
    SET self.fluid_flowing = false
    SET self.flow_rate = 0
    SET self.temperature = 20
    SET self.fluid_type = ""
  END
ELSE
  SET self.fluid_present = false
  SET self.fluid_flowing = false
  SET self.flow_rate = 0
  SET self.temperature = 20
  SET self.fluid_type = ""
END

listeners.script:
SET self.fluid_present = false
SET self.fluid_flowing = false
SET self.flow_rate = 0
SET self.temperature = 20
SET self.fluid_type = ""

components.name: Electrical Control Valve

actions.name: update_opening
actions.script:
IF self.powered THEN
  SET self.opening = self.signal
ELSE
  IF self.fail_open THEN
    SET self.opening = 100
  ELSE
    SET self.opening = 0
  END
END
CALL self.update_flow

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF self.opening > 0 THEN
  IF ANYSUP.fluid_present THEN
    SET self.fluid_present = true
  ELSE
    SET self.fluid_present = false
  END
  IF ANYSUP.fluid_flowing THEN
    SET self.fluid_flowing = true
    SET self.flow_rate = SUMSUP.flow_rate * self.opening / 100
    SET self.temperature = SUMSUP.temperature
    SET self.fluid_type = SUP(0).fluid_type
  ELSE
    SET self.fluid_flowing = false
    SET self.flow_rate = 0
    SET self.temperature = 20
    SET self.fluid_type = ""
  END
ELSE
  SET self.fluid_present = false
  SET self.fluid_flowing = false
  SET self.flow_rate = 0
  SET self.temperature = 20
  SET self.fluid_type = ""
END

listeners.script:
SET self.fluid_present = false
SET self.fluid_flowing = false
SET self.flow_rate = 0
SET self.temperature = 20
SET self.fluid_type = ""

components.imageSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0.0 0.0 256.0 256.0" width="256.0" height="256.0"><path d="M 0.00,256.00 L 0.00,86.29 L 256.00,256.00 L 256.00,86.29 Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><rect x="49.63" y="0.00" width="156.73" height="86.29" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="8"/><path d="M 128.00,43.15 L 128.00,169.71 M 49.63,43.15 L 206.37,43.15" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF ANYSUP.fluid_flowing THEN
  IF self.blocked THEN
    SET self.fluid_present = true
    SET self.fluid_flowing = false
    SET self.flow_rate = 0
    SET self.fluid_type = ""
    SET self.pressure_drop = 0
  ELSE
    SET self.fluid_present = true
    SET self.fluid_flowing = true
    SET self.flow_rate = SUMSUP.flow_rate
    SET self.temperature = SUMSUP.temperature
    SET self.fluid_type = SUP(0).fluid_type
    SET self.pressure_drop = self.resistance * self.flow_rate ^ 2 + 9810 * self.elevation_change
  END
ELSE
  SET self.fluid_flowing = false
  SET self.flow_rate = 0
  SET self.temperature = 20
  SET self.fluid_type = ""
  SET self.pressure_drop = 0
  IF ANYSUP.fluid_present THEN
    SET self.fluid_present = true
  ELSE
    SET self.fluid_present = false
  END
END

listeners.script:
SET self.fluid_present = false
SET self.fluid_flowing = false
SET self.flow_rate = 0
SET self.temperature = 20
SET self.fluid_type = ""
SET self.pressure_drop = 0

SET self.fluid_flowing = false
SET self.flow_rate = 0
SET self.fluid_type = ""
SET self.pressure_drop = 0

actions.name: on_toggle
actions.script:
IF self.active THEN
  SET self.active = false
  SET self.heating = false
  SET self.temperature = 20
  SET self.fault = false
ELSE
  IF ANYSUP.fluid_flowing THEN
    SET self.active = true
    SET self.fault = false
  ELSE
    SET self.fault = true
  END
END
CALL self.update_flow

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF ANYSUP.fluid_flowing THEN
  SET self.fluid_present = true
  SET self.fluid_flowing = true
  SET self.flow_rate = SUMSUP.flow_rate
  SET self.fluid_type = SUP(0).fluid_type
  IF self.active THEN
    SET self.heating = true
    SET self.temperature = 80
  ELSE
    SET self.heating = false
    SET self.temperature = SUMSUP.temperature
  END
ELSE
  SET self.fluid_present = false
  SET self.fluid_flowing = false
  SET self.flow_rate = 0
  SET self.heating = false
  SET self.temperature = 20
  SET self.fluid_type = ""
  IF self.active THEN
    SET self.fault = true
  END
END

listeners.script:
SET self.fluid_present = false
SET self.fluid_flowing = false
SET self.flow_rate = 0
SET self.heating = false
SET self.temperature = 20
SET self.fluid_type = ""
IF self.active THEN
  SET self.fault = true
END

SET self.fluid_present = false
SET self.fluid_flowing = false
SET self.flow_rate = 0
SET self.heating = false
SET self.temperature = 20
SET self.fluid_type = ""

componentSets.name: Specialist Process Components
componentSets.description: Components requiring more complex wiring conventions.

actions.name: update_flow
actions.script:
IF SUP(0).fluid_flowing THEN
  SET self.process_flowing = true
  SET self.process_temp_in = SUP(0).temperature
  SET self.process_fluid_type = SUP(0).fluid_type
ELSE
  SET self.process_flowing = false
  SET self.process_fluid_type = ""
END
IF SUP(1).fluid_flowing THEN
  SET self.service_flowing = true
  SET self.service_temp_in = SUP(1).temperature
  SET self.service_fluid_type = SUP(1).fluid_type
ELSE
  SET self.service_flowing = false
  SET self.service_fluid_type = ""
END
IF self.process_flowing AND self.service_flowing THEN
  SET self.heat_transfer_active = true
  SET self.process_temp_out = 80
  SET self.service_temp_out = 40
  SET self.fault = false
ELSE
  SET self.heat_transfer_active = false
  IF self.process_flowing THEN
    SET self.process_temp_out = self.process_temp_in
    SET self.service_temp_out = 20
    SET self.fault = true
  ELSE
    SET self.process_temp_out = self.process_temp_in
    SET self.service_temp_out = self.service_temp_in
    SET self.fault = false
  END
END
IF self.process_flowing THEN
  SET ALLINF(cold_outlet).fluid_present = true
  SET ALLINF(cold_outlet).flow_rate = SUP(0).flow_rate
  SET ALLINF(cold_outlet).temperature = self.process_temp_out
  SET ALLINF(cold_outlet).fluid_type = self.process_fluid_type
ELSE
  SET ALLINF(cold_outlet).fluid_present = false
  SET ALLINF(cold_outlet).flow_rate = 0
  SET ALLINF(cold_outlet).temperature = 20
  SET ALLINF(cold_outlet).fluid_type = ""
END
IF self.service_flowing THEN
  SET ALLINF(hot_outlet).fluid_present = true
  SET ALLINF(hot_outlet).flow_rate = SUP(1).flow_rate
  SET ALLINF(hot_outlet).temperature = self.service_temp_out
  SET ALLINF(hot_outlet).fluid_type = self.service_fluid_type
ELSE
  SET ALLINF(hot_outlet).fluid_present = false
  SET ALLINF(hot_outlet).flow_rate = 0
  SET ALLINF(hot_outlet).temperature = 20
  SET ALLINF(hot_outlet).fluid_type = ""
END
